children.label: A
children.text: shall provide for the Director to notify the enterprise in writing of the determination of the Director to impose the penalty, which shall be made on the record;

children.label: B
children.text: shall provide for the imposition of a penalty only after the enterprise has been given an opportunity for a hearing on the record pursuant to ; andsection 4582 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: may provide for review by the Director of any determination or order, or interlocutory ruling, arising from a hearing.

children.heading: Factors in determining amount of penalty
children.label: 2 Factors in determining amount of penalty
A
children.text: the gravity of the offense;

children.label: B
children.text: any history of prior offenses;

children.label: C
children.text: ability to pay the penalty;

children.label: D
children.text: injury to the public;

children.label: E
children.text: benefits received;

children.label: F
children.text: deterrence of future violations;

children.label: G
children.text: the length of time that the enterprise should reasonably take to achieve the goal; and

children.label: H
children.text: such other factors as the Director may determine, by regulation, to be appropriate.

children.heading: Action to collect penalty
children.label: d Action to collect penalty
children.text: If an enterprise fails to comply with an order by the Director imposing a civil money penalty under this section, after the order is no longer subject to review, as provided in sections 4582 and 4583 of this title, the Director may bring an action in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia to obtain a monetary judgment against the enterprise, and such other relief as may be available. The monetary judgment may, in the court’s discretion, include the attorneys’ fees and other expenses incurred by the United States in connection with the action. In an action under this subsection, the validity and appropriateness of the order imposing the penalty shall not be subject to review.

children.heading: Settlement by Director
children.label: e Settlement by Director
children.text: The Director may compromise, modify, or remit any civil money penalty which may be, or has been, imposed under this section.

children.heading: Deposit of penalties
children.label: f Deposit of penalties
children.text: The Director shall use any civil money penalties collected under this section to help fund the Housing Trust Fund established under .section 4568 of this title
